issues.description: Critical honesty discrepancy: The player claimed to modify 'tests/unit/test_agent_invoker.py', but the file does not exist on disk (path_exists=False). This caused a 'partial_honesty_abort', preventing any tests or quality gates from running.
issues.suggestion: Ensure that all files listed in 'files_modified' are actually created and present in the workspace before submitting the report.

rationale: The turn is rejected because the gathering status is 'partial_honesty_abort'. The honesty verification identified critical discrepancies: the player claimed to have modified 'tests/unit/test_agent_invoker.py', but the file does not exist on disk. This prevented the orchestrator from running any tests or quality gates to verify the implementation.
